name: Quantum Cryptography & Key Distribution
description: Implements quantum key distribution networks using entangled photon pairs for theoretically unbreakable encrypted communications. Deploys both fiber-optic and satellite-based QKD links for strategic military and diplomatic channels.

combinationBonuses.bonusDescription: Satellite-based QKD enables global quantum-secured communications
Dual quantum and post-quantum encryption creates layered unbreakable security
